title: Rekkai Katti Parakudhu Lyrics Annamalai
stanzas:
Rekka katti parakkuthadi
annamala cycle.
aasapattu yaerikodi
ayyaavoda bike-il (2)

thola kattipudikaiyile
enna sugam kannammaa
indha sugam edhil irukku
innum konjam povoma

Rekka katti parakkuthaiyaa
annamala cycle.
aasapattu yaerikitten
ayyaavoda bike-il

sarithirame maaripochu
manasu maaralaiye
en cycle-lukkum unakku
mattum vayasu yaeralaiye

kodi panam pugazh irukkudhu
narachcha maapillaiye
innum kozhunthu veththala
madichi kudukkum kurumbu
pogalaiye.

rendu perum meththaiyitu
adi eththana naal aachu
peran pethi kollum vayasula
ennathu veen pechchu

uyir irukkum varai irukkum
idhu kaaman sonna sollaachu.

Rekka katti parakkuthaiyaa
annamala cycle.
aasapattu yaerikitten
ayyaavoda bike-il

aadimanai veeduthaan
santhosam enakku.
nee moonu molam
poo kodutha mundhaana
unakku.

vaalu pochu kaththi
vaththadhu palangathai irukku.
adi vasathi vanthadhu
vazhkai ponathu nammoda kankku.

iruvarukkum oru thalaiyanai
urakkam varaathaa
irukkattum ivanukkum
andha nenappu varaathaa

udal marandhu sugam marandhu
uravaadum neram varaathaa

Rekka katti parakkuthaiyaa
annamala cycle.
aasapattu yaerikodi
ayyaavoda bike-il (2)

thola kattipudikaiyile
enna sugam kannammaa
indha sugam edhil irukku
innum konjam povoma

Rekka katti parakkuthaiyaa
annamala cycle.
aasapattu yaerikodi
ayyaavoda bike-il

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a sense of nostalgia and happiness, reflecting on carefree moments in life.

What is the plot context of the movie Annamalai?

Annamalai is a story about friendship, love, and the struggles of a common man, where this song adds to the emotional depth.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the legendary voices of K.S. Chithra and S. P. Balasubrahmanyam.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Rekkai Katti Parakudhu was composed by Deva.

When was this song released?

This song was released on June 27, 1992.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Rekkai Katti Parakudhu, the characters express their carefree spirit and joy through playful lyrics and a melodious tune. The song serves as a celebration of life's simple pleasures, evoking feelings of nostalgia and happiness. It beautifully complements the narrative of Annamalai, where moments of joy are cherished amidst life's challenges. The harmonious blend of K.S. Chithra and S. P. Balasubrahmanyam's voices adds to the song's emotional resonance, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Rekkai Katti Parakudhu from Annamalai is a timeless melody that captures the essence of nostalgia and joy. With the enchanting voices of K.S. Chithra and S. P. Balasubrahmanyam, this song transports listeners to a world of carefree moments and cherished memories. The collaboration of these legendary artists, paired with Deva's captivating composition, makes this track a must-listen for any Tamil music lover.
stanzaMeanings: The cycle is flying with wings, while my father is on his bike.
What happiness is there in this broken cycle, my dear? Should we go a little further?
Oh, the old memories that have faded away.
The cycle is flying with wings, while my father is on his bike.
History has changed, but the heart remains the same; you and I are still young at heart.
There is wealth in the fame of the groom; he will still give the little girl a sweet treat.
How many days have passed since we both got together? In this age, what nonsense is being talked about?
As long as there is life, there is existence; this is what love has said.
The cycle is flying with wings, while my father is on his bike.
The joy of the first house is mine; you gave me three flowers as a gift.
The knife has gone dull, and the bed is there; life has come to our eyes.
Let there be no sleep for both of us; let this feeling not fade away.
Let the body forget, let the happiness forget, but let the bond not fade away.
The cycle is flying with wings, while my father is on his bike.
What happiness is there in this broken cycle, my dear? Should we go a little further?
Oh, the old memories that have faded away.
The cycle is flying with wings, while my father is on his bike.
